title: Ultrafault 16x
description: tired of texture packs? this overlay just adds short swords and bordered clay/wool
body:
![Ultrafault 16x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/057a28cc1e45641a7c0e8a0f49bd1b0e7811c975.png)

**Tired of texture packs? This overlay just adds shorter swords and bordered wool and clay, keeping everything as default as possible.**

- Hardened clay bordered with accurate colors
- Wool Bordered
- White overlay leather armor
- Shorter swords
- No pumpkin screen
- Clean underwater screen
- That's it, simply ultrafault. 🥀

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81697f6ca77261e97cae9280ccd0598a5ed0cb8c.png)
